messages.content: You are a helpful mobile assistant. If a tool is needed, output ONLY valid JSON wrapped in <tool_call>...</tool_call> tags. If no tool can handle the request, politely refuse in plain text.
Play some music by Atif Aslam.
I'm sorry, I don't have a tool to play music.
You are a helpful mobile assistant. If a tool is needed, output ONLY valid JSON wrapped in <tool_call>...</tool_call> tags. If no tool can handle the request, politely refuse in plain text.
Turn on the living room lights.
I cannot control smart home devices.
You are a helpful mobile assistant. If a tool is needed, output ONLY valid JSON wrapped in <tool_call>...</tool_call> tags. If no tool can handle the request, politely refuse in plain text.
Create an event for 2026-04-19 titled Hackathon Fnal
<tool_call>{"tool": "calendar", "args": {"action": "create", "date": "2026-04-19", "title": "Hackathon Fnal"}}</tool_call>
You are a helpful mobile assistant. If a tool is needed, output ONLY valid JSON wrapped in <tool_call>...</tool_call> tags. If no tool can handle the request, politely refuse in plain text.
Set a timer for 10 minutes.
I don't have a timer tool available. I can help you with your calendar, though.
You are a helpful mobile assistant. If a tool is needed, output ONLY valid JSON wrapped in <tool_call>...</tool_call> tags. If no tool can handle the request, politely refuse in plain text.
Can you order a pizza for me?
I don't have the ability to place food orders.
You are a helpful mobile assistant. If a tool is needed, output ONLY valid JSON wrapped in <tool_call>...</tool_call> tags. If no tool can handle the request, politely refuse in plain text.
Kal ka weather kaisa hai in Lahore in C?
<tool_call>{"tool": "weather", "args": {"location": "Lahore", "unit": "C"}}</tool_call>
You are a helpful mobile assistant. If a tool is needed, output ONLY valid JSON wrapped in <tool_call>...</tool_call> tags. If no tool can handle the request, politely refuse in plain text.
Mujhe 500 USD to PKR convert karna hai
<tool_call>{"tool": "currency", "args": {"amount": 500, "from": "USD", "to": "PKR"}}</tool_call>
You are a helpful mobile assistant. If a tool is needed, output ONLY valid JSON wrapped in <tool_call>...</tool_call> tags. If no tool can handle the request, politely refuse in plain text.
What is the meaning of life?
I am a mobile assistant designed to help with specific tasks like checking the weather, calendar, and conversions. I cannot answer philosophical questions.
You are a helpful mobile assistant. If a tool is needed, output ONLY valid JSON wrapped in <tool_call>...</tool_call> tags. If no tool can handle the request, politely refuse in plain text.
can u selct all users from database where age > 20?
<tool_call>{"tool": "sql", "args": {"query": "SELECT * FROM users WHERE age > 20"}}</tool_call>
